Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff Amherst Associates Construction Management, Inc.'S Complaint
Off Calendar Nov-27-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Henry Yu, Esq. CCD LAW GROUP, P.C. (415) 398-8308 Attorney for Plaintiff AMHERST ASSOCIATES
CONSTRUCTION MANAGEMENT INC.
Casey S. Clow, Esq., CRAIGIE, McCARTHY k CLOW 415-732-7788 casey@cmclawpartners.com
Attorneys for Defendant, Appearing Specially

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT RICHARD BROWN's Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff Amherst Associates Construction Management, Inc.'s Complaint.

Defendant Richard Brown's motion to dismiss is denied. Plaintiff has shown that Mr. Brown has sought to evade service of process and that it acted diligently which is a valid exception per CCP 583.240(d) to mandatory dismissal. Significantly, Mr. Brown does not deny that he has sought to evade service of process.

Order is signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/HEK)
